description: SnapOtter is an open-source, self-hosted file manipulation suite with 200+ tools across images, video, audio, PDFs, and files. It includes batch processing, reusable pipelines, local AI tools, a browser image editor, and a REST API so files stay on your own server.
tagline: Self-hosted file toolkit for images, video, audio, PDFs, and files.
author: SnapOtter

tips.before_install: Default login is admin / admin. You will be asked to change the password after first login. This package uses SnapOtter embedded mode, so leave DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL unset unless you are moving to an external Postgres/Redis stack.

title: SnapOtter
